headline: Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev Opened Up About What Success Means To Him And The Legacy He Would Be 'Excited' To Tell His Grandkids
summary: Vlad Tenev, CEO of Robinhood Markets Inc., once stated that success, in his view, is creating “dramatically” more value for the world than for oneself.
